channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Window frame, 19th April
item.description:
Broken window frame left on Carver Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Carver Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned trailer, 18th April
item.description:
Since moving to this estate a few years ago we have never seen this trailer move. Does it serve a purpose?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pytchley Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black abandoned bike frame, 18th April
item.description:
No wheel, upside down and blocking the stand

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bolton Crescent, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: De, 18th April
item.description:
Dead cat found outside no. 36C Hamlet Road at c 11pm tonight, Saturday April 18th. No movement or collar seen.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36b, Hamlet Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike frame, 18th April
item.description:
Btwin frame missing seat, all rusty been there for years

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bolton Crescent, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree has been cut but trunk sticking out, 18th April
item.description:
Tree was cut in Sept 2025 as it had died. The trunk has been left and very long and needs to be cut as looks like it's going to fall into the road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wellington Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can road and gutter be swept here please?, 18th April
item.description:
Build up of leaves and debris here. Can it be cleared please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace View, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost not working, 18th April
item.description:
Lamppost outside No11 Hollinhwoetj are not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hollingworth Road, Petts Wood, Greater London

item.title: Loose BT manhole cover in pavement, 18th April
item.description:
Please secure this manhole cover

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, South Street, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Can cracked road surface on Forde Ave be checked?, 18th April
item.description:
Road surface is cracked. Please inspect

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Forde Avenue, Widmore, Greater London

A mattress and a range of other items dumped

item.title: Fly tipped itema, 18th April
item.description:
A mattress and an number of other items left on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thanet Road, North End, Greater London

item.title: Can pavement here be inspected please?, 18th April
item.description:
This pavement is affected by tree roots. Please can it be inspected and re-laid if possible?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Murray Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous road marking, 18th April
item.description:
The roundabout at the Bexley Village end of the North Cray Road has changed recently. A turning leading to the power station has been removed/blocked. The road markings have not been properly removed from the road surface at this location. As result, a car veered across into my lane due to a partially removed hatch marking pained on the road surface. Could this be completely removed from the road surface therefore preventing cars changing lanes erratically due to confusing road markings please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Cray Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: NW6 7NG (near 25 Dunster Gardens), 18th April
item.description:
Street light not working outside NW6 7NG (near 25 Dunster Gardens). The lamp is located between our property and the neighbouring social housing. It has not been working for over 6 weeks. The area is now very dark at night, which raises safety concerns for residents and pedestrians. Please could this be inspected and repaired as a priority.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plympton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 18th April
item.description:
Pallet dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress, sofa, trolley , since Feb, 18th April
item.description:
It s been there since Feb attracting more fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Newacres Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins emptied, bin men left this mess behind, 18th April
item.description:
Bins emptied, bin men left this mess behind. This area is always a stinking mess. Not sure what caretakers are getting paid for. The inside stairs area is also disgusting

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aden Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cumberland Market NW1 near Third age centre, 18th April
item.description:
On the corner opposite the block of flats called Moreland the corner of the pavement is broken and the pavement slabs all cracked here due to a heavy vehicle. Very near the Third age centre on Cumberland Market. Lots of elder people use this corner to cross the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cumberland Market, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
